name: trading-defi-default
description: Suggested policy preset for the trading-defi-agent starter. Adjust caps + allowlist in the dashboard once you're past initial testing.
notes: approval_required=true means single payments above approval_threshold_usd ($5) need human approval.
Set approval_required=false in the dashboard if you want every payment under the cap to auto-approve.

Allowlisted services (gates which registered DEX + price-feed providers the agent may pay) are managed in the Canopy dashboard. The trust boundary is the registry: only services with a registered slug can be allowlisted.
